item.dc:creator: IHasSnout

item.title: Ukraine Update Feb 20/21: Putin, Belarus, and Mobilization.
item.description:
Putin has recognized the breakaway regions and ordered Russian troops to enter them. While I will continue posting updates on the Ukraine situation I will NOT be posting any Ukrainian troop movement or any details of any Ukrainian military action/preparation.
Russian T-80BVM tanks at coordinates 50.539982, 35.848286 which is about 7 miles from Ukrainian border.
Putin's speech on Ukraine. It is bad. Very bad. Calls Ukraine once again "Soviet Ukraine created by Lenin". Sarcastically says he will "de-communize Ukraine for real". Putin says, Russia has paid all Soviet debt instead of sharing it with other republics. Blames Ukraine for undermining any constructive dialogue. Claims Ukraine has never had its statehood. "We know every name of people who have done it. We will find and punish them"
Putin signs decree recognizing the breakaway regions.
Ukrainian President Zelensky speaks live: Russia has left Minsk agreement. Russia has officially acknowledged its occupation of parts of Donbas.Russia is a part of conflict and cannot be seen another way. We want peace and we are consequent. We have asked the UNSC for a meeting. We will see who are our partners, and who will continue to try to influence Russia with words only. We have right for self-defence according to UN Charta. No reason for chaotic steps. We will go peaceful and diplomatic way. We have fear for nothing.We are on our land. It is not 2014. It is 2022. We have strong army. We are not afraid. We want peace. We are one nation. Glory to Ukraine!
President Zelensky addressed Ukrainians after 2am local time. “We are not afraid. We won’t cede anything.” He said Putin withdrew from Minsk Agreements by ordering troops into Ukraine officially. He called for emergency meetings of OSCE, Normandy Format, UNSC.
Head of Belarus' Security Council Volfovich: No one said that Russian troops would return to Russia tomorrow or the day after. The Allied Resolve exercise ends tomorrow but the Russian troop presence will continue. When the Russians depart will be determined by the commanders-in-chief (Putin and Lukashenko).
How quickly things change.
"Russia don't touch Ukraine!" 6 people unfurled banners against invasion in downtown Moscow. Waiting police immediately arrested them
Ukraine and Moldova move to cut energy ties to Russia.
Russian soldiers in not great conditions in Veselaya Lopan. They are from the 2nd Motorized Rifle Division and are both conscript and professional.
Luhansk (Russia) published a video of what the separatists claim is them removing a car of explosives before it could blow up a train of women & children evacuating to Russia. Metadata shows it was filmed (or at least edited) back in 2019.
What Russia claims is a Ukrainian artillery shell fired at the occupied areas. The copper driving band shows that the shell has never been fired.
Russian T-80BVM tanks with winterized camo, tactical markings, mounted machine guns, and extra fuel tanks. All unusual and concerning.
Economic action begins.
Eyewitnesses report that in Luhansk the military commandant's office takes men off the street and put them on buses.
Presented without comment.
Locals in occupied Donbass say forced mobilization is in full swing, Russian proxies are taking men away from their homes and even grabbing them off the streets. “Wanted to even take the little one. He is 15”
On Jan 31 Germany shut down three nuclear power plants. The same day the USA granted Qatar "Major Non-NATO Ally" status, almost certainly in exchange for assistance getting gas for Germany.
"Gazprom, a Russian state-owned company, is deliberately trying to store and deliver as little as possible,” - Ursula von der Leyen, European Commission president. The EU has said it would be able to cope with a partial cut-off of gas and has spoken with the USA, Qatar, Egypt, Azerbaijan and other countries.
Video posted by Ukrainian Army. "Зберігайте спокій та вірте в ЗСУ" [Keep calm and believe in the Armed Forces] Nice soundtrack.
Disturbing. Also probably true.
Source is Radio Free Europe but given the fact that many conscript soldiers have been seen this is believable. The only question is scale.
German airliner Lufthansa cuts off Ukraine. They are still flying to Moscow.
Russian shelling of a Ukrainian border post.
NATO speaks in favor of Ukraine.
Captain Sidorov Anton Olegovich Sidorov, a soldier of the 30th OMBR. Slain by Russian shelling on Feb 19. He had three daughters.
Ukrainian soldier plays chess on his phone in a helicopter. Ukrainian morale remains high.
Singing in the Kyiv metro.
Events are moving fast and are showing no signs of slowing. The final diplomatic efforts have begun. I hope they will succeed but I know that hope becomes further every day. To be clear the USA and NATO will not go to war. Even if they wanted to - and they do not - they lack the troops in the region. Reject misinformation. Stay informed. Stay safe. РАЗОМ ПЕРЕМОЖЕМО!

item.title: 13th favorite-and-forget
item.description: Because I want a trophy. Original poster has since deleted their account. SuperCook.Com – Search Recipes By Ingredients Privnote.Com – Write Notes To Someone That Will Destroy Itself Once He Reads It. Coffitivity.Com – Feeling Alone At Home, Free Murmur Sounds Gifyoutube.Com – Convert Youtube Videos To GIF Ninite.Com – Install All Required Softwares At Once Install and update all selected useful programs at once on your PC. CopyPasteCharacter.Com – Copy Paste Special Character Duolingo.Com – Learn New Languages For Free And In An Interesting Way Squirt.Io – Discover A New Way Of Reading Shouldiremoveit.Com – Choose Which Software You Should Remove From Your PC OldVersion.Com – Find Out Older Version Of Any Software Deadmansswitch.net – Send Emails When You Are Dead PrintFriendly – Print Any Web Page In A Print Friendly Format PrintWhatYouLike.Com – Print Exactly What You Like In A Page FreeCycle.Org – Find Free Things In Your Town Which People Are Willing To Give Away CouchSurfing – The Name Explains It Wolframalpha.Com – Computational Search For Your Keywords SimplyNoise.Com – Just Plain Sounds To Help You Sleep You can also set Sleep timer to stop it after you sleep. CamelCamelCamel.Com – Price Drop Alert For Big ECommerce Websites Ptable.Com – Periodic Table Made Easy Scribblemaps.Com – Just Draw And Mark On Google Maps And Share Them Mailvu.Com – Send Video Emails Rhymer.Com – Find Rhyme For Any Word ! Cool Tool For Poets WeTransfer.Com – Send Large Files Up To 2 GB For Free Wakerupper.Com – Schedule Your Friend Or Son A Wake Up Call Unfurlr.Com – Find Out Which Url Is Behind Any Short Url QClock – Find Local Time Of A Place PdfEditor – Edit PDF Online Projectnaptha.Com – Delete Text From Images Namechk.Com – Simultaneously Search Username Availability At All Websites MailDrop – Quick Disposable Email Address To Let You Sign Up At Not So Useful Websites JustDelete.Me – Collection Of Direct Links To Delete Your Profile At Websites Sleepyti.Me – Find Out When You Should Go To Bed For Sleeping HaveIBeenPwned.Com – Find Out Whether Your Email Is Leaked In Past Hack Attacks Sumopaint.Com – Use Microsoft Paint Like Software Online Magastack.Com – Read Magazines For Free FatFingers.Com – Find Ebay Items With Typing Errors And Thus Low Bid JoinHoney.Com – Automatically Applies Best Coupons When You Check Out Of Any Shopping Website WornONtv.Net – Find Outfits And Fashion Same As Worn By Stars On TV Shows HotelWiFiTest.Com – Find Hotels And Rank Them According To Wi Fi Speed. Good For Internet Loving Travelers. SkiPlagged.Com – Find Cheapest Flights In Nearest Date Range PushBullet.Com – Phone Notification On Your Desktop Corrupt-A-File – Missing Deadline ? Now Corrupt The File From This Website And Send To Your Boss Or Teacher. Wtfsigte.Com – Find Out Your Eating Location Mingled With The F Word Documentaryheaven.Com – A Heaven For Docu Lovers Archive Movies – Watch Free Films And Documentaries Pastebin.Com – Paste Any Text Instantly WobZIP.Org – Uncompress Files Online For Various Formats VirusTotal.Com – Scan Files Before Installing. For Suspicious Files Mixlr.Com – Create Live Audio Broadcast Minutes.Io -Quick And Effective Minutes Of A Meeting Youtube.Com/Tv – Watch Youtube In A TV Mode Studio.Stupeflix.Com – Make Cool Videos By Just Dragging Pics, Videos Etc. With Pre Made Themes Available (Apparently doesn't work? Thank you to @Superventilator for pointing that out.) Urbandictionary.Com – Find Meanings Of Slang And Modern Used Words Draw.Io – Draw Useful Diagrams Online And Save To Your PC Boxoh.Com – Track Your Shipment On Google Maps Mondrian.Io – Create And Save Vector Graphics Online Strangermeetup.Com – Random Chat With Strangers Anonymously Ge.Tt – Easily Share And Send Files With Your Friend Faxzero.Com – Send Free Fax Online Google.Com/History – See Your Search History Midomi.Com – Remember The Name Of The Song 12ft.io - Gets around paywalls (courtesy of @RulesOfImgur) millionshort.com - lets you filter out scumbag sites when looking for obscure things (courtesy of @MMythIncarnate)
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne

item.title: This use to be the internet people
item.dc:creator: ConsumerAffairs

item.title: It's never too late
item.description: I've been in love many times, including my ex wife, whom I was with for 12 years. I'm friends with most of them even after 30+ years in some cases. It wasn't that they were bad people or I was a piece of shit, our time just ended. Between my divorce, battling cancer, and just getting old and set in my ways, the idea of new love seemed implausible at best. Then I met her. We're the same age, have similar life experiences and easily accept each other for who we are. Nobody's looking for financial stability or the ability to create a family. We both work the same job and are both unable to have children. We are both just looking for a partner that accepts us, encourages us, and let's us be ourselves. It's a more pure love than I've ever experienced occurring at a time when I thought it was impossible. And so did she. Anyway, don't ever give up. Be the best you that you can and eventually the right person will come along, no matter how long it takes.
item.dc:creator: meme2theextreme
